ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "mmsi" TEXT /* Maritime Mobile Service Identity, a unique identifier for a vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., Cargo, Tanker, Passenger) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "width" REAL /* Width of the vessel in meters */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the vessel in meters */,
  "flag_state" TEXT /* Country of registration */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization number */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the vessel */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vessel undertaking the voyage */,
  "start_port" TEXT /* Port of departure */,
  "end_port" TEXT /* Port of arrival */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the captain responsible for the voyage */,
  "cargo_type" TEXT /* Type of cargo being transported */,
  "cargo_weight" REAL /* Weight of the cargo in tons */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the planned route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking_data" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vessel being tracked */,
  "base_datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the tracking data */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the vessel's position */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the vessel's position */,
  "sog" REAL /* Speed over ground in knots */,
  "cog" REAL /* Course over ground in degrees */,
  "heading" REAL /* Direction the vessel is heading in degrees */,
  "draft" REAL /* Current draft of the vessel in meters */,
  "engine_status" TEXT /* Status of the vessel's engine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_data_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the port is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "port_authority" TEXT /* Authority managing the port */,
  "berth_count" INTEGER /* Number of berths available */,
  "max_vessel_size" REAL /* Maximum size of vessel the port can handle in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated tracking data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in knots */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in nautical miles */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* General weather condition (e.g., Clear, Fog) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction from which the wind is blowing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., Login, Data View) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vessel generating the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Speeding, Deviating) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., Low, High) */,
  "acknowledged_by" INTEGER /* User who acknowledged the alert */,
  "acknowledged_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was acknowledged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vessel checked for compliance */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance check */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Outcome of the compliance check (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compliance check */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector who conducted the check */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific regulation checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_planning" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route plan */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vessel for which the route is planned */,
  "start_port" TEXT /* Planned departure port */,
  "end_port" TEXT /* Planned arrival port */,
  "planned_departure" TEXT /* Planned departure time */,
  "planned_arrival" TEXT /* Planned arrival time */,
  "estimated_fuel_consumption" REAL /* Estimated fuel consumption in tons */,
  "optimal_speed" REAL /* Recommended speed for optimal fuel efficiency in knots */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_planning_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)
